assessments.clauseTitle: VII. CI/CD & GitHub Pages Deployment Discipline

evidence.observation: GitHub Pages deployment workflow is not present in current CI definitions.
evidence.impact: Public demo deployment discipline cannot be guaranteed from CI.

assessments.rationale: No Pages deployment signal found under /workspaces/mmex-pwa/.github/workflows.

evidence.observation: src/locales/en_US.po cannot be resolved to an upstream PO source in this workspace.
evidence.impact: Terminology traceability to upstream MMEX PO files is weakened.

assessments.rationale: Upstream-first translation source references are present but not fully resolvable.

findings.summary: No Pages deployment signal found under /workspaces/mmex-pwa/.github/workflows.

recommendations.action: Add GitHub Pages deployment workflow that runs after successful master CI.
recommendations.verificationMethod: Run GitHub Actions workflow and verify Pages artifact publication.
recommendations.expectedOutcome: A tested build is automatically deployed as the canonical demo.

findings.summary: Upstream-first translation source references are present but not fully resolvable.

recommendations.action: Repair upstream PO source linkage and validate locale source consistency in CI.
recommendations.verificationMethod: Run compliance and locale linkage checks in CI for locale source files.
recommendations.expectedOutcome: Translation terminology traceability to upstream PO files is restored.
